description: Zero-cost static family genealogy web application
systemPrompt: You are working on 'The Family Tree' — a zero-cost, static HTML genealogy application. Read CLAUDE.md in full before making any change. The data is in data/family.json. All features must work without a server or backend. Never add paid services or APIs requiring keys. Privacy is paramount: living persons' contact info must be filtered by role. Always run node scripts/validate.js after modifying family.json. Design tokens are in CLAUDE.md — use them consistently. Current phase: check CLAUDE.md Build Phases section.
